data.title: RES approves 2025 results, dividend and new board for 2026–2028
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Recupero Etico Sostenibile S.p.A ( (IT:RES) ) has shared an announcement.

Recupero Etico Sostenibile S.p.A. approved its 2025 financial statements and reported a consolidated production value of €33.9 million, up 6.8% from 2024, confirming steady growth in its waste management and circular economy operations. Shareholders agreed to distribute a dividend of €0.08 per share, allocating €1.3 million of the €4.0 million net profit to payouts and carrying forward the remaining earnings.

The shareholders’ meeting also appointed a new board of directors for the 2026–2028 term, confirming Maria Valerio as chair and naming three independent directors to strengthen governance. The board’s total annual remuneration was set at €222,000, signaling a stable leadership and governance framework intended to support RES’s continued expansion and positioning in sustainable waste management markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:RES) stock is a Buy with a EUR12.10 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Recupero Etico Sostenibile S.p.A stock, see the IT:RES Stock Forecast page.

More about Recupero Etico Sostenibile S.p.A

Recupero Etico Sostenibile S.p.A. (RES) is an Italian circular economy and environmental sustainability group that manages the entire waste cycle, from selection and treatment to transformation and disposal. Founded in 1989 in the province of Isernia and listed on Euronext Growth Milan, it focuses on regenerating, recycling and reusing waste as production raw materials while investing in technological research to enhance environmental protection and worker safety.

Average Trading Volume: 3,718

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: €116.7M

The latest update is out from Ituran Location And Control ( (ITRN) ).

Ituran Location and Control Ltd., a leader in connected-car and location-based mobility services, offers telematics, vehicle recovery and fleet management solutions to customers in over 20 countries. With more than 2.6 million subscribers and about 2,800 employees, it holds a market-leading telematics position in Israel and Latin America and supports automotive, insurance and financing sectors.

On April 27, 2026, Ituran announced that it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on May 26, 2026, and will hold a video conference call that day to discuss the numbers. Management plans to present the quarterly performance and answer investor questions via a Zoom webinar, with a replay to be made available online for stakeholders unable to join live.

data.title: NS Group Confirms BiVa Holdings’ Share Purchases, Otani Group Control Rises to 53%
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from NS Group,Inc. ( (JP:471A) ).

NS Group, Inc. announced that BiVa Holdings Co., Ltd., led by major shareholder Akihiro Otani, has completed a planned market purchase of NS Group shares, consolidating control together with Otani and his asset management vehicle BV Asset Co., Ltd. As a result, these joint holders now control 27,623,844 shares, equivalent to 276,238 voting rights or 53.0% of the company’s voting rights, cementing their status as a controlling shareholder other than a parent company.

BV Asset remains the major and largest shareholder with direct ownership of 45.0% of voting rights, while indirect holdings through BiVa Holdings and Otani have risen to 8.0%, enhancing the shareholder group’s influence without altering NS Group’s classification of its parent or private parent companies. The company stated that this ownership consolidation will not affect its business performance, suggesting operational continuity despite a clearer concentration of control in the hands of Otani’s investment entities.

More about NS Group,Inc.

NS Group, Inc., listed on the TSE Prime Market, operates in the services sector, though this notice focuses primarily on its ownership structure rather than its operating businesses. The company’s shareholder base includes investment-focused entities such as BV Asset Co., Ltd., which engages in securities holding, management and investment, as well as real estate acquisition and management, reflecting a significant presence of financial and asset management interests in its capital structure.

Average Trading Volume: 433,705

data.title: Medcaw Rebrands as Talon Resources to Reflect Gold-Focused Strategy
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Medcaw Investments PLC ( (GB:MCI) ).

Medcaw Investments plc has rebranded as Talon Resources plc to align its corporate identity with its shift toward the Eagle Lake Gold Project, a gold-focused asset the company plans to acquire. The move underscores a broader transition from a general investment profile to a resource-driven strategy centered on precious metals.

The company’s ticker changes to TAR, while its ISIN and SEDOL remain the same and existing share certificates stay valid, minimizing administrative impact for investors. Talon Resources is also developing a new corporate website, with the previous Medcaw site remaining active in the interim to maintain continuity of information for stakeholders.

More about Medcaw Investments PLC

Medcaw Investments plc, now renamed Talon Resources plc, is an investment company pivoting toward natural resources through the proposed acquisition of the Eagle Lake Gold Project. The business is positioning itself as a resource-focused vehicle, reflecting a strategic emphasis on gold exploration and related mining assets.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

The latest update is out from Cementos Pacasmayo SAA ( (CPAC) ).

Cementos Pacasmayo S.A.A. has filed its April 2026 Form 6-K in the United States, furnishing unaudited interim consolidated financial statements as of March 31, 2026 and for the three-month period then ended. The report, signed on April 27, 2026, details the group’s balance sheet, profit and loss, cash flows and equity position, offering investors updated visibility into its leverage, liquidity, and profitability trends after the first quarter of 2026.

The statements show total assets of S/3.13 billion, with equity rising to S/1.27 billion and liabilities declining to S/1.86 billion compared with year-end 2025. First-quarter 2026 sales increased to S/555.7 million and gross profit improved to S/234.4 million versus the prior-year period, indicating stronger operating performance and suggesting a firmer financial footing that may bolster market confidence in the Peruvian cement producer.

data.description:

An announcement from Far East Horizon Limited ( (HK:3360) ) is now available.

Far East Horizon Limited has called its annual general meeting for 10 June 2026 in Hong Kong, where shareholders will review the audited financial statements for the year ended 31 December 2025 and vote on a proposed final dividend of HK$0.31 per share. The meeting will also consider the re-election of four directors, the authorization of the board to set directors’ pay, and the re-appointment of Ernst & Young as auditor.

In addition, shareholders will be asked to grant the board fresh general mandates to buy back up to 10% of the company’s issued shares and to allot and issue additional shares and related securities, including the sale or transfer of treasury shares. These mandates, if approved, would give the board greater flexibility in capital management and financing, potentially affecting future share issuance, buy-back activity and the company’s capital structure.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:3360) stock is a Buy with a HK$8.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Far East Horizon Limited stock, see the HK:3360 Stock Forecast page.

More about Far East Horizon Limited

Far East Horizon Limited is a Hong Kong-incorporated company listed on the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong. The group operates as a diversified financial and industrial services provider, with a focus on structured financing, leasing and related solutions that support corporate and institutional clients across mainland China and the wider region. Its activities place it within the broader financial services and capital markets ecosystem in Hong Kong.

data.title: Kerry Properties Sets 2026 AGM to Approve Results, Dividend and Share Issuance Mandate
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Kerry Properties ( (HK:0683) ) has shared an announcement.

Kerry Properties has convened its annual general meeting for 22 May 2026 in Hong Kong, where shareholders will review and adopt the audited financial statements and directors’ and auditor’s reports for the year ended 31 December 2025, and consider a final dividend for the period. The agenda also includes re-election of two board members, approval of directors’ fees, re-appointment of PricewaterhouseCoopers as auditor, and renewal of a general mandate authorising the board to issue new shares and related securities, which preserves financial flexibility for future capital raising and strategic initiatives.

The proposed share issuance mandate, subject to customary limits and exceptions such as rights issues, share option plans, and scrip dividends, would allow directors to allot, issue, and deal with additional shares and convertible instruments during a defined period, including arrangements that may complete after that period ends. These resolutions, if passed, will maintain the company’s ability to adjust its capital structure and funding mix efficiently, potentially influencing shareholder dilution, dividend policy, and the company’s capacity to respond to market opportunities in the property sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0683) stock is a Buy with a HK$28.30 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kerry Properties stock, see the HK:0683 Stock Forecast page.

More about Kerry Properties

Kerry Properties is a Hong Kong-based property company focused on investment and development projects, with interests in residential, commercial, and mixed-use real estate across key Asian markets. The group generates income from property sales, rental operations, and related services, and is listed on the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong, where it adheres to local corporate governance and disclosure standards.

data.title: Adagio Medical Posts Strong Pivotal Results for VT Ablation
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Adagio Medical Holdings ( (ADGM) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 26, 2026, Adagio Medical reported positive six‑month pivotal results from its FULCRUM‑VT IDE trial of the vCLAS ventricular ablation system in patients with ischemic and non‑ischemic structural heart disease. The study met safety and effectiveness endpoints, showing 98% acute non‑inducibility of targeted ventricular tachycardias, 84% freedom from implantable cardioverter defibrillator shocks, 59% freedom from VT recurrence, and a 2.4% major adverse event rate.

The results demonstrated equivalent performance in ischemic and non‑ischemic cardiomyopathy, significant reductions in ICD shocks and VT‑related hospital readmissions, and broad de‑escalation of amiodarone use. These pivotal data, presented at the Heart Rhythm Society 2026 conference, position ULTA and the vCLAS system as a potential new benchmark for endocardial VT ablation and will support Adagio’s planned FDA premarket approval application, with implications for both clinical practice and the large VT patient population.

The most recent analyst rating on (ADGM) stock is a Buy with a $3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Adagio Medical Holdings stock, see the ADGM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ADGM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ADGM is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (minimal revenue, sustained losses, and ongoing cash burn with elevated leverage). Technicals are a key offset with price trending above major moving averages and positive momentum, while valuation remains constrained by losses (negative P/E). A positive FDA IDE trial expansion supports the outlook but does not yet change near-term financial risk.

To see Spark’s full report on ADGM stock, click here.

More about Adagio Medical Holdings

Adagio Medical Holdings, Inc. is a medical device company specializing in catheter-based ablation technologies for the treatment of cardiac arrhythmias, built around its proprietary Ultra-Low Temperature Ablation (ULTA) platform. The company is currently focused on ventricular arrhythmias with its purpose-built vCLAS cryoablation system, which is CE marked in Europe and under evaluation in the FULCRUM-VT U.S. pivotal IDE trial for potential FDA approval.

Average Trading Volume: 95,081

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $33.54M

data.description:

New Era Energy & Digital ( (NUAI) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 10, 2026, New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. notified SharonAI, Inc. of its irrevocable decision to prepay in full a $50 million senior secured convertible promissory note tied to its acquisition of Texas Critical Data Centers LLC. SharonAI chose not to convert any portion of the note into equity, preserving New Era Energy & Digital’s existing ownership structure.

On April 24, 2026, the company paid the $50 million principal plus accrued interest in cash, fully satisfying its obligations under the convertible note. As a result, New Era Energy & Digital now has no remaining payment obligations related to the completed acquisition, clarifying its capital commitments and simplifying its balance sheet exposure to the Texas Critical Data Centers asset.

data.title: SK Telecom to Dispose of Treasury Shares for Director and Executive Stock Compensation
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Sk Telecom ( (SKM) ) has issued an update.

On April 27, 2026, SK Telecom’s board approved the disposal of 51,952 common treasury shares, valued at an estimated ₩5.20 billion based on a reference price of ₩100,000 per share, to be executed over the counter between April 28 and May 31, 2026. The transaction, facilitated by SK Securities, remains within the treasury share plan endorsed at the March 26, 2026 annual meeting and follows a reduction of treasury stock holdings to about 1.79 million shares, or 0.83% of outstanding common shares.

The company will use 4,860 of these shares as stock compensation for five independent non-executive directors under a program linked to enterprise value, and allocate roughly 49,152 shares as long-term incentive stock awards to 128 executives and former executives. By funding director and executive pay with existing treasury stock rather than cash or new issuance, SK Telecom aligns leadership incentives with shareholder value while avoiding capital dilution and signaling continued emphasis on performance-based governance.

The most recent analyst rating on (SKM) stock is a Sell with a $27.96 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sk Telecom stock, see the SKM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SKM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SKM is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by the sharp profitability and return deterioration and a cautious earnings-call outlook tied to cybersecurity incident impacts and dividend reduction. These risks are partially offset by strong cash generation, manageable leverage, and a bullish technical trend (though currently overbought), while valuation is only moderately supportive given a ~27 P/E and ~2.7% yield.

To see Spark’s full report on SKM stock, click here.

More about Sk Telecom

SK Telecom Co., Ltd. is a leading South Korean telecommunications operator headquartered in Seoul, providing mobile and fixed-line voice and data services as well as related ICT offerings. The company focuses on the domestic telecom market while also expanding into digital and platform-based services, positioning itself as a core player in Korea’s communications and technology infrastructure.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy
